generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft for precise rotational position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmission
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox for backlash reduction and positional accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmission
]

instance SensorDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
    base:desc "Time series position data transmitted via MQTT protocol from physical encoders to digital twin"
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Rotational position data from motor shaft encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Rotational position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis; motor current (I_M) as input control variable and torque (τ_M) as output"
]

instance GearTransmissionSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission system with initial gear stage and cycloidal gear mechanism for low gear ratio and precise torque transmission"
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagrams for component interfaces and composition"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SysMLBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state machines for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance ACMEModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component-based system structures"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACMEADL
]

instance AADLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for component-based system structures"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADLADL
]

instance MontiArcModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Architecture Description Language for component-based system structures"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcADL
]

instance SimulinkSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for behavioral and analytical simulations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance CppModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C++ for detailed logic implementation in digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppTool
]

instance JavaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Java for detailed logic implementation in digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JavaTool
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for multi-level abstraction modeling (requirements, functional, logical, product/technical layers)"
]

instance RFLPMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for managing system complexity in requirements, functions, logics, physics"
]

instance OOSEMMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for managing system complexity"
]

instance SPESMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for managing system complexity"
]

instance SMArDTMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for managing system complexity"
]

instance ACMEADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component interfaces and composition"
]

instance AADLADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for component interfaces and composition"
]

instance MontiArcADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Architecture Description Language for component interfaces and composition"
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation and analytical modeling"
]

instance CppTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for detailed behavior implementation"
]

instance JavaTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming language for detailed behavior implementation"
]

instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Industrial robot system under study for digital twin, focusing on first axis components including motor, gearboxes, and Siemens controller"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmissionSystem, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through rigorous validation by comparing simulated data against measured physical system data to quantify deviations. Friction models are described with high accuracy to ensure realistic dynamic behavior. The sensor arrangement, including dual position encoders, contributes to reducing positional uncertainty, and quality assurance processes involve continuous error detection and correction mechanisms to ensure data and model validity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for streaming sensor time series data between physical and virtual components. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system complies with industry standards including SysML for systems engineering modeling, ACME and AADL for architecture description languages (ADLs) specifying component & connector structures, and MontiArc for behavior modeling using Automaton and state machines. These standards ensure interoperability among heterogeneous modeling tools and stakeholders as per [31]."
]
